title: Junior Investment Banker at EY India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at EY India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
EY India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India Asia Pacific Associates:
EY India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India Asia Pacific Associates!
